core_mechanism: Analog emulation through emergent low-energy effective dynamics: a tunable, engineerable microscopic many-body system is designed so that its long-wavelength / low-energy sector is governed by the same equations as an otherwise-intractable target model, letting the controllable surrogate stand in for and be measured in place of the target
brief_reason: The abstract engineers designed cold-atom systems whose low-energy sector reproduces specific target field theories (Thirring and Gross-Neveu) so that the controllable system can probe the target's spectral and correlation properties as an alternative to direct simulation.
